blockers.description: Page 1 section map not yet locked — user was clarifying
blockers.workaround: ask the clarification, then confirm map

blockers.workaround: layout reserves the space; design later

blockers.workaround: make real via GHL form/product inventory, or keep honestly vague, before launch

human_actions_pending.action: Confirm Page 1 section map + build approach (section-by-section recommended)

human_actions_pending.context: names the tool in body topic 5

human_actions_pending.action: Rosa: align on reverse value stack content/decay

decisions.decision: Headline D — 'Stop Watching Other People Get Rich In Real Estate'
decisions.rationale: user chose; fear-of-sidelines + freedom angle, GC brand energy

decisions.decision: Light/airy palette as default; navy as alternate
decisions.rationale: user loved light after seeing it desktop + mobile; tickets pop; trustworthy/airy

decisions.decision: Ticket section = comparison-table variant C with real physical-ticket art per tier
decisions.rationale: user wants tier comparison + room to show the physical tickets

decisions.decision: Page 2 = single primary BUY CTA + tiny 'talk to specialist' link; booking is the later recovery; booking page loops 'just buy' back to checkout
decisions.rationale: one job per page; booking recovers non-buyers

decisions.decision: Reverse value stack parked pending Rosa
decisions.rationale: current live-page bonuses aren't the right set to 'take away' from

decisions.decision: Brand copy rules: no word 'FREE', no italics
decisions.rationale: readability + campaign messaging; saved to memory

decisions.decision: Build via GSD section-by-section sketches; repo writes routed through GSD

uncommitted_files.note: pre-existing deletion from before this session — NOT ours; leave as-is or confirm with user

next_action: Resume the Page 1 section-map decision: answer the user's clarification on the 9-section map (esp. whether to keep the 7 PDF topics grouped in sections 4 & 5 or break them out), lock the map, then start sketch 002 = Hero/opt-in section.
context_notes: Running GSD sketch flow. Sketch 001 (ticket section) is locked: light/airy default, comparison-table variant C, real ticket images in assets/, mobile = stacked ticket cards. Whole sketch is token-driven so the system re-skins from themes/. Pages live as reviewable artifacts/sketches; nothing yet written to funnels/ repo blocks. IMPORTANT TOOLING NOTES: (1) gsd-sdk = use the GLOBAL `gsd-sdk` command — local get-shit-done/bin/gsd-tools.cjs does NOT exist here. (2) The sketch toolbar 'Phone' button only narrows the #frame container, NOT the viewport, so it does NOT trigger @media breakpoints — verify mobile by resizing the actual browser viewport (Chrome DevTools resize_page).
